channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists discover a giant 'planet factory' beyond Jupiter
item.description: Scientists believe a dust-filled ring just outside Jupiter acted like a cosmic 'planetesimal factory,' producing multiple generations of early space r...

item.title: NASA's Psyche spacecraft uses Mars as a giant slingshot toward a mysterious metal world
item.description: NASA's Psyche spacecraft just used Mars as a giant gravitational slingshot to continue its journey toward a strange metal-rich asteroid. The close fly...

item.title: Supercomputer simulations reveal how cosmic magnetic fields form
item.description: Advanced plasma simulations have shown how turbulence in the universe can generate vast magnetic fields.

item.title: Prehistoric fish skull sheds light on early land animal evolution
item.description: A 380-million-year-old fish skull from Antarctica offers clues about how animals first began walking on land.
